T

TEXT_MSG - Static variable in class com.rays.util.EmailMessage
Constant representing plain text message type
threadLocal - Static variable in class com.rays.common.UserContextHolder
Thread-local storage for the UserContext, ensuring each thread maintains its own independent context instance.
TimetableCtl - Class in com.rays.ctl
REST controller for managing Timetable-related operations in the ORS application.
TimetableCtl() - Constructor for class com.rays.ctl.TimetableCtl
 
TimetableDAOImpl - Class in com.rays.dao
Data Access Object (DAO) implementation for TimetableDTO in the ORS application.
TimetableDAOImpl() - Constructor for class com.rays.dao.TimetableDAOImpl
 
TimetableDAOInt - Interface in com.rays.dao
DAO interface for TimetableDTO in the ORS application.
TimetableDTO - Class in com.rays.dto
Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a Timetable entity in the ORS application.
TimetableDTO() - Constructor for class com.rays.dto.TimetableDTO
 
TimetableForm - Class in com.rays.form
Form class for handling timetable operations.
TimetableForm() - Constructor for class com.rays.form.TimetableForm
 
TimetableServiceImpl - Class in com.rays.service
Service implementation class for managing timetable operations.
TimetableServiceImpl() - Constructor for class com.rays.service.TimetableServiceImpl
 
TimetableServiceInt - Interface in com.rays.service
Service interface for managing timetable operations.
to - Variable in class com.rays.util.EmailMessage
Recipient email address
toString() - Method in class com.rays.dto.RoleDTO
Returns a string representation of this RoleDTO instance, including the role name and description.
type - Variable in class com.rays.dto.AttachmentDTO
The MIME content type of the attachment (e.g., image/jpeg).
